1.gl: blood (as that which when shed causes death) of man or an animal; by analogy, the juice of the grape; figuratively (especially in the plural) bloodshed (i.e. drops of blood)
to withdraw (both literally and figuratively, whether intransitive or transitive)
1.kj: cease, depart, go back, remove, take away.
1.dv: a primitive root (perhaps rather the same as H4184 (מוּשׁ) through the idea of receding by contact);

1.gl: a city (a place guarded by waking or a watch) in the widest sense (even of a mere encampment or post)
1.kj: Ai (from margin), city, court (from margin), town.
1.dv: or (in the plural) עָר; or עָיַר; (Judges 10:4), from H5782 (עוּר)

1.gl: literally a failure of flesh, i.e. emaciation; figuratively, hypocrisy
something torn, i.e. a fragment, e.g. a fresh leaf, prey, food

2.kj: [phrase] aloud, bleating, crackling, cry ([phrase] out), fame, lightness, lowing, noise, [phrase] hold peace, (pro-) claim, proclamation, [phrase] sing, sound, [phrase] spark, thun
2.dv: or קֹל; from an unused root meaning to call aloud;

2.gl: a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight)
2.dv: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy);

2.kj: commotion, confused noise, earthquake, fierceness, quaking, rattling, rushing, shaking.

2.gl: properly, to stamp, i.e. to spring about (wildly or for joy)

2.dv: or (shortened) אֹפָן; from an unused root meaning to revolve;

3.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative

3.gl: to totter or waver (through weakness of the legs, especially the ankle); by implication, to falter, stumble, faint or fall

3.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
3.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.

3.kj: abundance(-antly), all, [idiom] common (sort), excellent, great(-ly, -ness, number), huge, be increased, long, many, more in number, most, much, multitude, plenty(-ifully), [idiom]

3.gl: a steed (as stretched out to a vehicle, not single nor for mounting ); also (by implication) a driver (in a chariot), i.e. (collectively) cavalry

4.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

4.gl: a family, i.e. circle of relatives; figuratively, a class (of persons), a species (of animals) or sort (of things); by extension a tribe or people
to sell, literally (as merchandise, a daughter in marriage, into slavery), or figuratively (to surrender)

5.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

18.gl: Ashshur, the second son of Shem; also his descendants and the country occupied by them (i.e. Assyria), its region and its empire
18.kj: Asshur, Assur, Assyria, Assyrians. See H838 (אָשֻׁר).
18.dv: or אַשֻּׁר; apparently from H833 (אָשַׁר) (in the sense of successful);

18.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

18.kj: excellent, famous, gallant, glorious, goodly, lordly, mighty(-ier one), noble, principal, worthy.

19.gl: to cross over; used very widely of any transition (literal or figurative; transitive, intransitive, intensive, causative); specifically, to cover (in copulation)
19.kj: alienate, alter, [idiom] at all, beyond, bring (over, through), carry over, (over-) come (on, over), conduct (over), convey over, current, deliver, do away, enter, escape, fail, ge

19.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
19.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

19.gl: bad or (as noun) evil (natural or moral)
19.kj: adversity, affliction, bad, calamity, [phrase] displease(-ure), distress, evil((-favouredness), man, thing), [phrase] exceedingly, [idiom] great, grief(-vous), harm, heavy, hurt(-f

19.gl: properly, to be rubbed or worn; hence (figuratively) to be weak, sick, afflicted; or (causatively) to grieve, make sick; also to stroke (in flattering), entreat
19.kj: beseech, (be) diseased, (put to) grief, be grieved, (be) grievous, infirmity, intreat, lay to, put to pain, [idiom] pray, make prayer, be (fall, make) sick, sore, be sorry, make su
19.dv: a primitive root (compare H2342 (חוּל), H2470 (חָלָה), H2490 (חָלַל));

19.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
19.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
19.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

19.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
19.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
19.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,
